chorus_ready.title: Stockpile 16 Chorus Fruit (void mobility for the deep End)

subtitle.text: You are on the other side now. The old laws no longer apply.

description: You have broken the seal, entered the End, and reached the outer islands.
The void is no longer a threat. It is a territory.
The Void Gate scroll unlocks the deep End — the structures and enemies that exist
further from the central island than most players ever travel.
Find it in End City loot chests during your outer island exploration.
The void age is the age of inheritance completed.
You carry twelve civilizations' worth of knowledge.
You carry the record of every mistake they made.
The question now is what you do with it.
→ Stockpile Chorus Fruit for deep End mobility [collect]
→ Research the Void Gate scroll (End City loot) [check]
